name: Avocado Crabmeat Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 large Ripe avocado, diced into 1/8 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Add a small amount of oil from the artichokes as you mix.
3. Chill the salad for at least 30 minutes before serving.
4. Serve on lettuce leaves with lemon slices.
